name: Ancient Guardian Awakens
description: The stone guardian stirs to life, its eyes glowing with ancient magic!
ambient_description: The animated statue's stone joints grind as it moves relentlessly toward you.
victory_description: With a final shuddering crack, the statue crumbles into rubble. Ancient coins scatter from within its hollow core.
defeat_description: You flee from the unstoppable guardian, its heavy footsteps echoing behind you.
